items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Bob Thornton. UC Irvine F was drafted 87th in 84 by NY. Bench guy for NY. PHI & UTA from 85-92 before going to Italy. Randomly returned to NBA in 95-96 for WAS for 7 gms. Per bio "Rough, Tough banger....knew what he had to do to stay in league and did it."
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Bonus Hollander POTD Bob Thornton. UC Irvine F was drafted 87th in 84 by NY. Bench guy for NY. PHI & UTA from 85-92 before going to Italy. Randomly returned to NBA in 95-96 for WAS for 7 gms. Per bio "Rough, Tough banger....knew what he had to do to stay in league and did it."

items.title: Pacers reached agreement on a one-year deal with veteran Larry Nance Jr., league source confirmed to Fieldhouse Files.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Pacers reached agreement on a one-year deal with veteran Larry Nance Jr., league source confirmed to Fieldhouse Files.

They're already a tax team — they have all year to get under — and Nance Jr. would count ~$2.45M against the cap.

He'll become the 15th player under contract

items.title: Larry Nance Jr., Pacers Agree To One-Year, $4M Deal https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/286620/Larry-Nance-Jr-Pacers-Agree-To-One-Year-$4M-Deal
items.author: RealGM
items.body_excerpt: Larry Nance Jr., Pacers Agree To One-Year, $4M Deal https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/286620/Larry-Nance-Jr-Pacers-Agree-To-One-Year-$4M-Deal

items.title: You'll see this reported as a nearly $4 million deal. Nance's minimum salary, as a veteran with 10+ years of service, is about $3.88 million. But a veteran's minimum deal would only come with a cap hit of $2.45 million. Working for more details.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: You'll see this reported as a nearly $4 million deal. Nance's minimum salary, as a veteran with 10+ years of service, is about $3.88 million. But a veteran's minimum deal would only come with a cap hit of $2.45 million. Working for more details.

items.title: The win in Phoenix was one of the Sky's better performances of the season.
items.author: Drew
items.body_excerpt:
The win in Phoenix was one of the Sky's better performances of the season.

It also doesn't erase the broader challenge ahead. 

At 7-14, they're 3-10 against teams above .500 and 4-4 against teams below .500.

The challenge now is proving Tuesday wasn't a one-off.

items.title: Talked about this more in the article, but not being ready to host ASW isn’t a huge deal for the Sky’s training facility.
items.author: Julia Poe
items.body_excerpt:
Talked about this more in the article, but not being ready to host ASW isn’t a huge deal for the Sky’s training facility.

The bigger issue is that players have not had consistent access to courts and rehabilitation resources for close to a month — and the team can’t or won’t give a move-in date.

items.title: The Obama Center will host several major Friday events — including media day — for WNBA All-Star weekend.
items.author: Julia Poe
items.body_excerpt:
The Obama Center will host several major Friday events — including media day — for WNBA All-Star weekend.

It’s the first use of the new campus for a pro sports event.

But the move also highlights extensive delays to the Sky’s training facility, which was originally slated to host community events.

items.title: Hugo Gonzalez is included on the Summer Celtics roster. Unclear how much Gonzalez will play after just playing in FIBA World Cup Qualifiers for Spain this week.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Hugo Gonzalez is included on the Summer Celtics roster. Unclear how much Gonzalez will play after just playing in FIBA World Cup Qualifiers for Spain this week.

Some other players to watch:

Chris Cenac Jr
Dillon Mitchell
Amari Williams
Curtis Jones
Tucker DeVries
Milos Uzan
